Create a new optimization study

Source: R/study.R
create_study.Rd

Create a new optimization study

Usage

create_study(
  direction = "minimize",
  sampler = NULL,
  pruner = NULL,
  storage = NULL,
  study_name = NULL,
  load_if_exists = FALSE
)

Arguments

direction

"minimize" or "maximize".

sampler

A sampler object (e.g. tpe_sampler()). Defaults to random_sampler().

pruner

A pruner object (e.g. median_pruner()). NULL disables pruning.

storage

A storage backend. Defaults to InMemoryStorage$new().

study_name

Character name. Auto-generated if NULL.

load_if_exists

For SQLite: if TRUE, load existing study with this name.

Value

A Study R6 object.

Examples

study <- create_study(direction = "minimize", sampler = tpe_sampler(seed = 1L))
study$optimize(function(trial) trial$suggest_float("x", -5, 5)^2, n_trials = 5)
study$best_value
#> [1] 0.5307613
